author: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon
book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.

metadata.author: The Fourth Ecumenical Council. The Council of Chalcedon

title: Canon XV.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: A woman shall not receive the laying on of hands as a deaconess under forty years of age, and then only after searching examination.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: And if, after she has had hands laid on her and has continued for a time to minister, she shall despise the grace of God and give herself in marriage, she shall be anathematized and the man united to her.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: No person shall be ordained deaconess except she be forty years of age.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: If she shall dishonour her ministry by contracting a marriage, let her be anathema.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: This canon should be read carefully in connexion with what is said in the Excursus on deaconesses to canon xix. of Nice.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
verses.text: This canon is found in the Corpus Juris Canonici, Gratian’s Decretum, Pars II., Causa XXVII, Quæst.

verses.book: The XXX Canons of the Holy and Fourth Synods, of Chalcedon.
